commit.message:
Fix PDP data timing: add PANEL_READY handshake to content script

Root cause: sendPdpDataToPanel fires at 1500ms but the iframe React app
isn't ready to receive messages until ~2-3s. The ALTAANA_PDP_SIZES message
was sent before the panel's listener existed.

Fix:
- Content script now handles ALTAANA_PANEL_READY from the iframe and
  re-sends PDP data (sizes, text, category) when the panel is ready
- Add 4s backup retry in doInject for robustness
- Remove broken iframe load listener setup (ran before DOM existed)
- Auto-recommend now fires on pdpText arrival (not just pdpSizes)
- Increase auto-recommend timeout from 3s to 5s

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: full run uses all teams; test run uses 3 random teams

- Set DAILY_TEST_MODE=0 in run_all scripts to prevent accidental team limit
- Set DAILY_TEST_MODE=1 explicitly in run_test scripts for clarity
- Use random.sample() in daily_snapshot.py when in test mode instead of first-N slice

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Links apontam para /s/[id]/club/[subName] que é o comportamento
correto quando os subclubes existem no settlement.
Se settlement mostra "não encontrado", é porque os dados precisam
ser reimportados após criar os subclubes (prefix rules).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix sync script failing on empty Scholar data

grep exits with code 1 when no matches are found, which kills the
script under set -euo pipefail before the SKIP_SCHOLAR guard is
reached. Add || true to all Scholar grep pipelines and wrap the
Scholar HTML building in the SKIP_SCHOLAR conditional.

- Remove stripe-replit-sync dependency, use native Stripe SDK for webhook verification

commit.message:
Fix Yahoo Finance 429 rate limiting with crumb mutex and request batching

- Add promise-based mutex to prevent concurrent crumb fetches (thundering herd)
- Increase crumb TTL from 30min to 55min
- Add 429 retry with backoff to crumb fetch steps
- Batch bulk options flow requests (20 concurrent → batches of 5 with 300ms delay)
- Add 300ms delay between short interest batches
- Increase options flow cache TTL from 2min to 5min

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix team cell flash, scope keyboard override to active cell

- Team flash: .flag animation was invisible (display:none, zero-size
  triangle). Replaced with .team-flash::after CSS animation matching
  the gold check-flash pattern, using --team-color custom property.
- Keyboard: only preventDefault on arrow/space/backspace when a cell
  is selected (cw.selected truthy). Clicking outside puzzle/clues now
  deselects, restoring normal browser key behavior.
- Added click-outside-puzzle deselect handler to solve page (edit
  already had one).

commit.message:
Feature/effect bundle refactor (#326)

* feat(magic): add Affinity and Resonance domain models with factories and tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(magic): update all FKs from ModifierTarget to Resonance/Affinity

Replace all magic model FKs that pointed to mechanics.ModifierTarget
(for resonances/affinities) with direct FKs to the new Resonance and
Affinity models. Remove category-validation clean() methods that are
no longer needed since FK type safety replaces runtime checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(mechanics): strip resonance fields from ModifierTarget

Remove resonance-specific fields from ModifierTarget now that
resonances and affinities are proper domain models in the magic app:
- affiliated_affinity (self FK)
- opposite (self OneToOne)
- resonance_affinity (CharField)

Also remove ResonanceAffinity TextChoices from constants.py and
strip opposite/resonance_affinity from serializer field lists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(magic): update factories to use Resonance/Affinity models

Remove AffinityModifierTargetFactory and ResonanceModifierTargetFactory.
Update all factories that referenced ResonanceModifierTargetFactory to
use ResonanceFactory instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(magic): update services for Resonance/Affinity models

Update calculate_affinity_breakdown to work with Resonance QuerySet
instead of ModifierTarget. Update add_resonance_total type hint.
Update get_aura_percentages to use Resonance.affinity and
CharacterAffinityTotal.affinity FK instead of old string-based fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(magic): update serializers for Resonance/Affinity models

Replace ModifierTargetSerializer with ResonanceSerializer that works
with the new Resonance domain model. Update all serializers that
displayed resonance details (CharacterResonance, ThreadResonance,
CharacterAnimaRitual, Gift, ThreadType) to use ResonanceSerializer.
Update GiftCreateSerializer to query Resonance.objects.all() instead
of filtering ModifierTarget by category.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(magic): update views for Resonance/Affinity models

Replace ModifierTarget references with proper Resonance model imports
and update all select_related/prefetch_related calls to use the new
field paths (affinity, modifier_target__codex_entry).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(conditions): update DamageType.resonance FK to magic.Resonance

Change DamageType.resonance from pointing at mechanics.ModifierTarget
to magic.Resonance, completing the extraction of resonance data from
the generic modifier target system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(mechanics): update services for Resonance model

Pass effect.target.resonance (the actual Resonance instance) to
add_resonance_total instead of the ModifierTarget. Add hasattr guard
for data consistency safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(admin): update export/import tests for ModifierTarget field removal

Remove affiliated_affinity, opposite, and resonance_affinity from the
bogus ModifierTarget fixture record in test_atomicity_on_error, as
these fields no longer exist on ModifierTarget.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(magic): update all tests for Resonance/Affinity models

Replace ResonanceModifierTargetFactory with ResonanceFactory and
AffinityModifierTargetFactory/ModifierTarget affinities with AffinityFactory.
Update CharacterAffinityTotal to use affinity FK instead of affinity_type.
Remove test for resonance without affiliated affinity (no longer possible).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(mechanics): update tests for resonance field removal

Delete ModifierTargetResonanceFieldsTest class (fields moved to Resonance model).
Replace ResonanceModifierTargetFactory with ResonanceFactory in integration tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: update remaining app tests for Resonance/Affinity models

Replace ResonanceModifierTargetFactory with ResonanceFactory in character
creation and character sheets tests. Update test_affinity_totals.py to use
Affinity FK instead of affinity_type CharField and Resonance model instead
of ModifierTarget for resonance totals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update CLAUDE.md files and TECH_DEBT for Resonance/Affinity extraction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: regenerate all migrations for Phase A — Resonance/Affinity extraction

Regenerated all migrations from scratch after extracting Resonance/Affinity
from ModifierTarget into proper magic app models. Fixed test files that still
referenced ModifierTarget for resonance-related operations. Added materialized
view RunSQL operations for areas (AreaClosure) and codex (SubjectBreadcrumb).

All 2017 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: move modifier_target FK to ModifierTarget side (PR review fix)

ModifierTarget now owns the FK to Affinity/Resonance via target_affinity
and target_resonance fields, consistent with the existing target_trait
pattern. Previously the FK was on Affinity/Resonance pointing back to
ModifierTarget, which reversed the dependency direction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[fix] Pipeline artifacts in output, HTML formatting, prompt quality issues

Output assembly (output.py):
- Filter pipeline artifacts (synthesis_data, writing_brief, evaluation,
  protocol, advisory_report) from paper output — these are internal
  working docs that were leaking into the final paper
- Fix ## subheaders inside sections not rendering as HTML <h3> tags
- Fix ordered/unordered list tracking — lists no longer break into
  separate <ol>/<ul> blocks when type switches

Conceptual prompts (conceptual.py):
- Add separation rules: theoretical_background = literature only,
  framework = your model only. Prevents content overlap/redundancy
- Remove forced 3-stream minimum — streams must earn their place by
  generating at least 1 proposition (no orphan streams)
- Add proposition quality tests: obviousness filter, mechanism test,
  shape test (linear/U-shaped/threshold)
- Critic now checks for background-framework redundancy and
  stream-proposition alignment

commit.message:
Fix null school data crash: loading guards + key-based remount

- useSchool: reset school=null and loading=true at start of effect
  when schoolId changes, so there's never a window where loading=false
  and school=null simultaneously (which bypassed both guards)
- App: add SchoolProfileRoute wrapper that passes key={schoolId} to
  SchoolProfile, forcing a full remount when navigating between schools
  so stale state from the previous school never leaks through

commit.message:
fix(init): define functions before main execution, fix curl-pipe compatibility

- Replace BASH_SOURCE-based local path detection with direct GitHub fetch
  (BASH_SOURCE[0] is unreliable when script is piped through curl)
- Read interactive prompts from /dev/tty instead of stdin so --adopt works
  correctly when the script is piped via curl | bash
- Extract shared _scaffold() helper to remove duplication between modes
- Fix local keyword usage inside _adopt_mode (was outside a function context)

Add regression test suite for verification benchmarks

allocation on all tiers.
